title: Archer Aviation Inc. (ACHR) Stock Price, News, Quote & History
text: Archer Aviation Inc. (ACHR) is trading at $6.60 USD, up +1.85% or +$0.12. Recent performance shows the stock is up 22.22% over the past month, down 26.17% over the past 6 months, down 12.23% year-to-date, down 25.09% over the past year, and down 33.06% over the past 5 years. The company is listed on NYSE exchange with Nasdaq real-time pricing. The broader market showed mixed performance with the S&P 500 up 0.11%, though the VIX volatility index rose 7.10%. Archer Aviation has an upcoming earnings call scheduled for May 11, 2026 at 5 PM EDT for Q1 2026 results. The Yahoo Finance profile provides access to comprehensive information including news, research reports, historical data, financials, analysis tools, and options trading details for ACHR stock. The stock represents an early-stage eVTOL aircraft developer with significant liquidity but substantial losses and FAA certification timeline uncertainty.
